gist.headline: Once upon a prompt
gist.blurb: PollenPages has joined the library. Spin up illustrated children's books and fantasy tales with a little AI magic.
gist.summary: Added PollenPages to the main apps list, enabling users to generate fully illustrated narratives and children's books.
gist.impact: Users can now easily access a dedicated tool for creating and visualizing fantasy stories from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy library setting. The PollenPages app is represented as a large, glowing magical book. Polly the Bee is the storyteller/reader.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, reading from a massive glowing book that rests on a mushroom stump. Magical lime green (#ecf874) sparkles float up from the pages. Soft pastel library background with wooden shelves. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
